chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2697 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For hearing of Misc. No.13050/2023 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 15-05-2025 Mr. Tanveer Bhutto, advocate holds brief for Mr. Shahab Imam, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Anas Habib, advocate for the respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General On the last date, following order was passed:- This petition is pending against a show cause notice since 2023. Today Ms. Abida Bokhari, advocate holding brief for Mr. Shahab Imam, learned counsel for the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondent states that the petition is not maintainable against a show cause notice. At the request of learned counsel for the petitioner, to come up on 15.05.2025. Today once again brief is being held and adjournment is being sought. The petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
